metadata.description: Matilha core methodology plugin — phase-gated skills (scout, plan, hunt, gather, howl, review, den, pack), matilha-compose companion-pack-aware gateway, matilha-bootstrap SessionStart hook, matilha-design UX/UI router, matilha-init project bootstrap.

plugins.name: matilha
plugins.description: 11 methodology orchestration skills + SessionStart activation priority hook + deterministic sigil rendering + /matilha-install slash command. Works standalone OR composes with 7 companion packs (ux, growth, harness, sysdesign, software-eng, software-arch, security) delivering 128 domain skills.
